cnbe_layer_policy.cnbe128: research archive for multiple evidence witnesses, confidence, and review history
cnbe_layer_policy.cnbe32: compact carrier only after evidence gates pass; never overrides Hanzi evidence
cnbe_layer_policy.cnbe64: extended archive for stroke sequence, component tree, and source anchors

core_position.rule: 8105 is the controlling baseline for national-standard claims. Outside-8105 rows may align to 8105-derived project rules only as Agent-standard candidates.

current_blockers.8105_structure_join: 8105 core rows require standard-derived structure/decomposition join
current_blockers.formal_full_catalog_gf0017_scoring: blocked until item-level source evidence is complete

decision.reason: The project is ready to plan a bounded 300-character pilot around the frozen 8105 core. It is not ready for full-catalog encoding writes or database reconstruction.

cross_reference_only.allowed_use: review navigation, source discovery, semantic disambiguation
cross_reference_only.forbidden_use: final labels, GF0017 points, CNBE row writes, database reconstruction

allowed_sources: GF/GG/GB 国家语言文字规范
structured 8105 knowledge derived from local standard assets
national_standard.allowed_use: direct or standard-derived evidence after row-level validation
national_standard.forbidden_use: none; this is the only layer for national-standard claims

standard_aligned.allowed_use: project-level evidence support and human review after standard alignment
standard_aligned.forbidden_use: direct national-standard authority or automatic GF0017 scoring

gf0017_model.current_policy: Do not assign formal full-row scores until every item has validated source evidence. Existing partial character-set coverage points do not authorize final labels or CNBE writes.

items.required_evidence: 通用规范汉字笔顺规范 evidence
现代常用字部件规范 evidence
部件及部件名称规范 evidence
现代常用独体字规范 evidence
结构类型 and decomposition evidence

implementation_sequence: audit 8105 item-level evidence joins for the 8 GF0017 items
run pilot evidence join without scores or CNBE writes
produce human review packet with blank final fields
merge reviewed evidence only after explicit authorization and audit
then consider formal scoring and CNBE32/64/128 candidate mapping

outside_8105_fill_strategy.action: confirm literal character, Unicode scalar, normalization, and scope
compare structure, radical, stroke, and component patterns against frozen 8105 rules
outside_8105_fill_strategy.stop_condition: no 8105 support examples or conflicting rule family

outside_8105_fill_strategy.action: attach Cihai, Kangxi, Zhonghua Dazidian, and Yuanliu context when available
outside_8105_fill_strategy.stop_condition: dictionary conflict or no usable source context

outside_8105_fill_strategy.action: use ZDIC/Wiki only for reviewer navigation and gap discovery
emit review candidate metadata only after all no-write gates pass
outside_8105_fill_strategy.stop_condition: attempted final label, score, CNBE row, database, or release claim

pilot_design.sampling_rule: deterministic by Unicode, catalog scope, evidence status, and blocker class

strata.expected_output: evidence status and review packet, not rewritten CNBE rows
strata.name: 8105_core_control
strata.purpose: prove national-standard core evidence and GF0017 item joins

strata.name: outside_8105_strong_dictionary_context
strata.purpose: test 8105-aligned rule transfer with strong dictionary/origin support

strata.expected_output: review queues and blockers, not filled values
strata.name: outside_8105_extension_or_gap
strata.purpose: stress-test gaps, extension characters, ZDIC navigation, and stop gates

purpose: Freeze 8105 as the national-standard core and define how the full 97,686-row catalog can be filled through standard-aligned and Agent-standard evidence gates without repeating AI hallucination.
stop_gates: do not generate final structure labels from visual intuition
do not assign GF0017 scores from cross-reference-only evidence
do not write CNBE rows before source-evidence merge and audit
do not rebuild SQLite databases in this planning phase
do not duplicate the 97,686-row catalog into another XLSX/database
do not label outside-8105 rows as national-standard outputs
